reviews.comment:
Podrían mejoras la limpieza.
La limpieza de la playa era impecable a pesar del viento. La limpieza del baño de hombre era impecable, no así la limpieza del baño de mujeres.

(Translated by Google)
The cleanliness could be improved.
The beach was spotless despite the wind. The men's restroom was spotless, but the women's restroom was not.
